codeReview.summary: The hardening commit fixes the prior precedence regression: effective-policy merge now starts from platform-derived review-scope defaults and only overlays explicit project-policy overrides, while existing trust-boundary behavior and regression coverage remain intact.

summary: Review passed: after comparing the original failed implementation with the precedence-hardening follow-up, platform context/max-file defaults are preserved for nil and partial project policies, and the regression tests cover the prior failure modes.
